summary: Iteration 10: Frontend-only testing of 8 new features from TypeScript to React/JSX migration. All features verified working correctly.

issues: React warning: Each child in a list should have a unique 'key' prop in TableBody (UDSMembersTable)
React warning: <button> cannot be a descendant of <button> in AccordionTrigger

passed_tests: Site Sizing Recommendations - Site Name field is editable (input field)
Site Sizing Recommendations - # IPs field is editable (number input)
Site Sizing Recommendations - Role dropdown works (GM, GMC, DNS, DHCP, DNS/DHCP)
Site Sizing Recommendations - Platform dropdown works (NIOS, NIOS HA, NIOS-X, NXaaS)
Site Sizing Recommendations - Hardware SKU dropdown works (TE-906-HW-2AC, TE-906-HW-AC)
CSV Export button downloads site-sizing-export.csv with correct data
YAML Export button downloads site-sizing-export.yaml with correct data
Dossier Free Upsize shows green card when within 2 units of next tier (tested with qty=4)
Dossier tier display shows current tier badge (Standard for qty=4)
Dossier math display shows QPD (100 QPD for qty=4) and tokens (1,800 tokens)
Floating Save Button appears when there are unsaved changes
Floating Save Button shows 'Unsaved changes' text with Save button
Add Site button creates manual site with defaults (1000 IPs, DNS/DHCP, NIOS, TE-926, 880 tokens)
Export buttons have data-testid='export-csv' and data-testid='export-yaml'
critical_code_review_comments: TokenCalculatorSummary.jsx: Well-structured with proper memoization (useMemo, useCallback)
DossierSection.jsx: Free upsize logic correctly calculates tier thresholds and token savings
FloatingSaveButton.jsx: Properly uses DiscoveryContext for isDirty, isSaving, lastSaved state
Minor: Console warnings about unique keys in TableBody and nested buttons should be fixed for cleaner console
seed_data_creation: Used existing test customer 'Test Customer for Discovery' with 2 DCs and 2 Sites
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 features from the migration are working: 1) Site Sizing table with editable fields (name, IPs, role, platform, hardware SKU), 2) CSV/YAML export buttons, 3) Dossier free upsize card (shows when within 2 units of next tier), 4) Dossier tier badge and math display, 5) Floating Save Button, 6) Add Site button. To test Dossier free upsize: go to Tokens tab > Security > enable TOKEN CALCULATOR > enable Dossier > set quantity to 4 to see 'Free Upsize Available' card.

dossier_free_upsize.test_case: Quantity 4 shows 'Free Upsize Available' (1 unit from Professional tier at 5)
